privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to create a Talon Voice configuration specifically for reviewing bodycam footage, creating files in the C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bodycam_review directory and writing append logs to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bodycam_review_log.csv. Both metadata claims exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. However, a major bug exists in the task architecture: the task hooks require setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 to execute, but both scripts are completely absent from the task directory. This guarantees that the verifier will perpetually fail when attempting to read the non-existent C:\task_result.json.
